{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Li
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Li]] are identified by wearing much jewelry and carrying banners bearing the Snake and the [[Tree]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c8">''Unsouled'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Li]] clash with the Wei in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
